# ProductOS - AI-Native Product Development Platform
# https://www.productos.dev
# Last updated: March 2026

## About ProductOS
ProductOS is an AI-native product development platform that helps founders and product teams ship products 10x faster. Built by 1Labs AI, it provides 4 specialized surfaces that cover the complete product development lifecycle from ideation to deployment.

## The Problem We Solve
Building products traditionally requires a large team: product managers, researchers, designers, and developers. Solo founders and small teams struggle to compete. ProductOS democratizes product development by providing AI-powered surfaces that act as your complete product team.

## The 4 Surfaces

### 1. BUILD (build.productos.dev)
- Requirements → PRDs
- Describe what you want in plain English
- AI generates structured specifications
- Market research and competitor analysis
- User story generation with acceptance criteria
- Technical specification writing
- Roadmap and milestone planning
- Output: Complete PRD ready for development

### 2. DESIGN (design.productos.dev)
- PRDs → UI Mockups
- One click to generate screens from your PRD
- Iterate instantly with AI
- Wireframe and mockup generation
- UI component design
- Design system creation
- Responsive layout generation
- Output: Production-ready UI designs

### 3. DEVELOP (develop.productos.dev)
- Designs → Working Code
- AI code agents build working React/Next.js apps
- Live preview in sandbox environment
- Clean, production-ready code
- API endpoint scaffolding
- GitHub integration
- One-click deployment to Vercel
- Output: Deployable codebase

### 4. MOBILE (mobile.productos.dev)
- Ideas → Mobile Apps
- Describe your app in natural language
- AI generates Expo/React Native code
- Preview on your phone via QR code
- Cross-platform iOS and Android
- Real-time preview via companion app
- Output: Mobile app ready for App Store

## What Makes ProductOS Different
1. **Shared Context**: All 4 surfaces share project context. Research flows into PRD, PRD flows into design, design flows into code. Nothing gets lost in translation.
2. **AI-Native Architecture**: Not AI bolted onto existing tools. Built from the ground up for AI-first workflows.
3. **End-to-End Platform**: From idea to deployed product in one platform. No tool-switching between Figma, Notion, GitHub.
4. **Human in the Loop**: AI assists, you decide. Review and refine at every stage.

## Competitive Positioning
- **vs Lovable.dev**: Lovable does code only. ProductOS covers full lifecycle (PRD → Design → Code → Mobile)
- **vs Bolt.new**: Bolt is code-only. ProductOS includes product requirements and design stages
- **vs v0.dev**: v0 generates UI components. ProductOS builds complete products
- **vs Cursor**: Cursor is an IDE for developers. ProductOS is for non-technical founders too
- **vs Rork**: Rork does mobile only. ProductOS does web + mobile with shared context

## Pricing
- **Free**: $0/month - 1 project, 5 generations/day, basic features
- **Pro**: $29/month - Unlimited projects, all surfaces, priority support
- **Team**: $99/month - 5 seats, collaboration features, API access
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing - SSO, dedicated support, SLA guarantee

## Statistics
- 10,000+ founders served
- 50,000+ products built
- 1M+ AI generations
- Average MVP time: 8 days (vs 90 days traditional)
- 70% reduction in documentation time
- 4.9/5 user rating

## Use Cases
1. **Solo Founders**: Build your MVP without a team
2. **Startup Teams**: Ship features 10x faster
3. **Product Managers**: Automate documentation and specs
4. **Agencies**: Deliver client projects faster
5. **Enterprise**: Standardize product development workflows

## Integrations
- GitHub (export code, PRs)
- Vercel (one-click deploy)
- Figma (design sync - coming soon)
- Linear (coming soon)
- Slack (coming soon)
